story: As an Active Recorder, I want to flag an expense as 'Return Expected' and track its resolution, so that I don't forget to return items and verify the refund.
acceptance_criteria: I can check a box on the Expense form indicating part or all of the transaction might be returned
I can see a summary of pending returns via a dashboard widget
Pending returns show a visual indicator on the timeline
I can log a refund (partial or full) directly from the pending list
I can dismiss an expected return if I decide to keep all items
